mapper.insert: INSERT INTO check_in(elderly_id, bed_id, check_in_time, apply_user_id, status, remark, is_deleted) VALUES(#{elderlyId}, #{bedId}, #{checkInTime}, #{applyUserId}, #{status}, #{remark}, 0)
mapper.update:
UPDATE check_in
elderly_id = #{elderlyId}, bed_id = #{bedId}, check_in_time = #{checkInTime}, remark = #{remark},
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE check_in SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE check_in SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM check_in WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT ci.*, e.name as elderlyName, b.bed_name as bedName, r.room_name as roomName, bd.building_name as buildingName, u.real_name as applyUserName FROM check_in ci LEFT JOIN elderly e ON ci.elderly_id = e.id LEFT JOIN bed b ON ci.bed_id = b.id LEFT JOIN room r ON b.room_id = r.id LEFT JOIN building bd ON r.building_id = bd.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON ci.apply_user_id = u.id WHERE ci.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY ci.create_time DESC
